_comment: Representative response for strategy_evolution in RegTech context.

current_state_analysis.summary: NexaCompliance operates a traditional enterprise marketing model with moderate agent-economy readiness — strong enterprise infrastructure but low agent discoverability.

future_state_recommendations.vision_statement: NexaCompliance becomes the default agent-discoverable RegTech partner for procurement agents evaluating compliance automation.

transition_steps.name: Signal Foundation
transition_steps.description: Publish compliance capability catalog and marketing state to stigmergic ledger in machine-readable JSON.

transition_steps.name: Agent-Economy Integration
transition_steps.description: Expose Agentverse-compatible endpoints so procurement agents can evaluate and request compliance modules autonomously.

questions.question: On a scale of 1-10, how satisfied were you with the outcome?
What would have made the result significantly better?
Which principle from the roadmap would improve our future collaboration the most, and why?
